name: Bell Financial Group Limited
analysis: BFG has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3970. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
